name: app-academia
description: Responsive HTML workout plan with animated exercise GIFs.

scripts.build:web: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html www/index.html && cp styles.css www/styles.css && cp -R gifs www/gifs
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android && npm run android:gradle:debug
scripts.apk:release: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android && npm run android:gradle:release
scripts.apk:release:v1.1: npm run apk:release && mkdir -p release && cp android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk release/App-Academia-v1.1-release.apk
scripts.apk:release:v1.2: npm run apk:release && mkdir -p release && cp android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk release/App-Academia-v1.2-release.apk
scripts.apk:commit: npm run apk:debug && mkdir -p release && cp android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk release/App-Academia-V1-debug.apk
